# Support This Project 💖

Thank you for considering supporting **100 Days 100 AI Agents**! Your support helps maintain and improve this open-source project.

## 🙏 Why Support?

This project requires significant time and resources:

- **Research** - Learning and implementing latest AI agent patterns
- **Development** - Building 100 production-ready agents
- **Documentation** - Creating comprehensive guides and tutorials
- **Maintenance** - Keeping dependencies updated and fixing bugs
- **Community** - Responding to issues and helping contributors

## 💰 Ways to Support

### ⭐ Free Ways

- **Star the repo** - Show your appreciation
- **Share** - Tweet, post, tell your colleagues
- **Contribute** - Submit PRs, report bugs, improve docs
- **Feedback** - Share ideas and suggestions

### ☕ Financial Support

If this project has helped you, consider buying me a coffee:

[![Buy Me A Coffee](https://img.shields.io/badge/Buy%20Me%20A%20Coffee-FFDD00?style=for-the-badge&logo=buy-me-a-coffee&logoColor=black)](https://buymeacoffee.com/ayusingh54)

### 💻 Sponsor via GitHub

You can also sponsor through GitHub Sponsors for perks like:

- 🏅 Badge on your profile
- 📋 Priority issue responses
- 🗣️ Direct communication channel
- ✨ Early access to new agents

## 🎁 Sponsor Perks

| Tier          | Amount | Perks               |
| ------------- | ------ | ------------------- |
| ☕ Coffee     | $5/mo  | Thank you mention   |

| 🎮 Supporter  | $30/mo | Priority support    |
